title: Placebo Effect as Downward Causation

analysis.object: T581: Placebo Effect as Downward Causation depth analysis

pill_eml0.description: Sugar pill: EML-0 inert; no active chemistry
pill_eml0.reason: Placebo is EML-0: chemically inert, discrete object

belief_eml1.description: Belief triggers exponential biochemical cascades: EML-1
belief_eml1.reason: Expectation triggers EML-1 opioid release, immune activation, autonomic response

measured_improvement.reason: Placebo response is EML-2: quantifiable, measured symptom change

oscillation.description: Placebo effect wears off, gets reinforced, wears off: EML-3 oscillatory
oscillation.reason: Placebo oscillates: EML-3 belief reinforcement cycle

downward_causation.description: EML-inf consciousness forces depth transitions in EML-1 body: downward causation
downward_causation.reason: Placebo = consciousness (EML-inf) -> body chemistry (EML-1); downward causal chain

analysis.theorem: T581: Placebo Effect as Downward Causation (S860).

key_theorem: T581: Placebo Effect as Downward Causation (S860).
